subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God, my Lord and my Hope! I beseech the Kingdom of Thy loving mercy and humble myself before the might of Thy dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی و سیدی و رجائی انی ابتهل الی ملکوت رحمانیتک و اتذلل الی جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
